title: Cannot make one Gantt from different boards
excerpt: It will be good to be able to create Gantt charts from different tables at this moment this is not possible.

posts.author: NatachaB (Natacha Barrantes)
posts.cookedHtml: It will be good to be able to create Gantt charts from different tables at this moment this is not possible.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @NatachaB!

This is actually possible through The Gantt Chart View and Widget - specifically the Gantt Chart in The Dashboards. Our Dashboards feature allows you to consolidate data from multiple boards in the form of different types of widgets.

Let me know if this helps!
